common.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this?
chat.welcome.intro: I'm %agent% — your personal chat. Ask me anything about code, smart home, your wiki, or whatever else is on your mind.
chat.welcome.action.wiki_sub: What do you know about our Wiki?
chat.welcome.action.help_sub: What can I help you with?
chat.welcome.action.help_prompt: What can I do for you?
news.title: News
news.subtitle: From your configured RSS feeds, generated by Hermes.
news.empty_body: Set up the cronjob below so Hermes generates posts.json from your RSS feeds.
news.no_feeds_configured: No RSS feeds configured yet — add some under
news.cron_note_title: Make Hermes generate the news for you
news.cron_note_intro: News are written into posts.json by your blog_generator.py on the agent. Schedule it 3× per day — morning, noon, evening (e.g. 0 7,12,19 * * *):
news.cron_example_label: Example prompt (copy + paste into a Hermes cronjob):
news.cron_prompt_template:
Run the blog generator: python3 {path}

The generator fetches the configured RSS feeds, filters political content via the built-in is_political() function, categorises articles and writes new blog posts.

IMPORTANT:
- No political news (filter is built in)
- Only use known categories from config.yaml
- Just run the script, it handles everything

Report briefly how many posts were created.
wiki.title: Wiki
wiki.no_pages: No pages yet — create a new entry to get started.
wiki.delete_confirm: Do you really want to delete „%s"?
settings.title: Settings
settings.saved: Settings saved. Changes are active immediately.
settings.app.language.label: Portal interface language
settings.app.language.hint: The agent's content (news, tasks, briefing) is not translated — it stays as your Hermes Agent generates it.
settings.app.visibility.hint: Not everyone uses every feature. Hide single menu items from header and sidebar here. Routes stay technically reachable but are no longer linked.
settings.app.field.user_name: Your name (how the agent addresses you)
settings.app.field.ssh_key_path: SSH key path (private key on the portal host)
settings.app.connection.no_hosts: No SSH hosts found in the local network.
settings.app.connection.hosts_found: SSH host(s) found in the local network
settings.app.connection.ip_picked: IP set as agent host. Click
settings.app.connection.container_warnin: Portal runs in a Docker/HA container and only sees its own container subnet:
settings.app.connection.container_hint: Enter your LAN subnet below (e.g. "192.168.178" or "192.168.178.0/24").
settings.save_bar.title: Apply changes
settings.save_bar.hint: Path and connection changes take effect immediately (no restart needed).
ssh.wizard.import_hint: Already have an SSH key on another device or installation? Paste it here to reuse it — the public key on your Hermes host (in ~/.ssh/authorized_keys) stays valid.
ssh.wizard.private_key_label: Private key (entire file content, incl. BEGIN/END markers)
ssh.wizard.overwrite_existing: Overwrite existing key on this device
ssh.wizard.import_exists: Key already exists on this device. Tick "Overwrite" to replace.
support.intro: Hermes Portal is an open-source project. If you like it and want to support development — we appreciate every cup of coffee ☕ and every ⭐ star on GitHub!
support.kofi_desc: Buy us a coffee on Ko-fi
support.community_intro: Code, bug reports, feature requests, community Q&A — all on GitHub.
settings.app.paths.help.title: Recommended folder structure on the Hermes Agent
settings.app.paths.help.body: Inside the configured exchange folder these subfolders should exist:
settings.app.paths.help.briefing: Tip for your own briefing.html: since every briefing has different content (weather, RSS, GitHub, transit …), it always looks different — the portal therefore does NOT inject header/footer, it shows your file raw in the iframe. A template is in the repo under `_wiki_server/templates/briefing_default.html` — copy it as a starting point and let your agent fill it with your data.
settings.app.paths.help.rss: RSS feeds: the list under „📰 RSS feeds" below is passed as JSON in the ENV variable NEWS_RSS_FEEDS to your news generator script — and the Forum-RSS field is passed as BRIEFING_FORUM_RSS to your briefing script. If you use the bundled blog_generator.py (installable from the „🛠 Agent scripts" box), changes here apply automatically on the next cronjob run.
settings.app.agent_scripts.title: Agent scripts (one-click install on the Hermes agent)
settings.app.agent_scripts.intro: These scripts run on your Hermes agent and read the Portal settings via ENV variables (RSS feeds, weather coordinates, paths). Install them once per agent — afterwards your cronjobs use them and pick up Portal-side changes automatically.
settings.app.agent_scripts.overwrite_con: This will overwrite the existing script on the agent. Continue?
chat.title: Chat
chat.session.title: Sessions
chat.slash.usage_redirect: Token usage isn't a chat answer — it's tracked locally in the Portal:
chat.slash.quit_hint: To close the Portal, just close the browser tab — the server keeps running.
chat.slash.help_title: Slash commands available in Hermes Portal
chat.slash.help_agent: Forwarded to the Hermes Agent (REPL-only — may not work via `-z`):
chat.slash.help_agent_desc: These reach the agent as a literal prompt. The CLI interprets them only in interactive REPL mode.
ssh.wizard.title: Portal SSH key
ssh.wizard.reveal_warning: Anyone with this private key can SSH to your Hermes agent. Only paste it into the trusted Hermes Portal on another device.
ssh.wizard.reveal_confirm: Really reveal the private SSH key? Make sure nobody can see your screen.
ssh.wizard.pubkey_label: Public key (paste on the Hermes host into
ssh.wizard.manual_title: Manual: how do I install the key on the Hermes host?
ssh.wizard.step2_pre: Log in to the Hermes host as
ssh.wizard.step3: Open the file ~/.ssh/authorized_keys (create it if missing, chmod 700 ~/.ssh).
ssh.wizard.step4: Append the pubkey line at the end, save.
ssh.wizard.alt_command: Or directly from the Portal host:
ssh.wizard.auto_title: Automatic: prompt for the Hermes agent (copy & paste into the Hermes CLI)
ssh.wizard.auto_desc: Give this prompt to your Hermes agent (via chat or `hermes -z "<prompt>"`). It installs the SSH server, adds the authorized key and opens the port.
personality.intro_pre: Agent name, your name and wiki categories are set in the
personality.intro_post: tab. The personality (tone, knowledge, preferences) lives in the memory files below: SOUL.md for character, USER.md for your specifics, MEMORY.md for long-term memories.

activity.title: Activity
aufgaben.title: Task list
aufgaben.subtitle: Tasks for you and Hermes — done or still open?
aufgaben.field.name: Task name
aufgaben.export.intro: Export the current task list as a Markdown file or import an existing one.
aufgaben.autosync_hint: All changes are saved instantly to aufgaben.md.
aufgaben.cron_note_title: Make Hermes actually work on these tasks
aufgaben.cron_note_intro: Adding tasks here writes them to aufgaben.md, but the Hermes agent only picks them up if a cronjob regularly scans the file. We recommend running the cronjob every 2–4 hours (e.g. 0 */2 * * *). Set up a cronjob on the agent with this prompt:
aufgaben.cron_example_label: Example prompt (copy + paste into a Hermes cronjob):
aufgaben.cron_prompt_template:
Look at the task list under {path} and work on the tasks assigned to {agent} if any are open. Tasks assigned to {user} are handled by the user. Once a task is finished, mark it as done in aufgaben.md.

IMPORTANT:
- If several tasks are assigned to {agent}, work them one after another.
- Work structured: solve one task, mark it as done, only then start the next.
- Tasks are executed without further questions to {user}.
update.banner.available: A new Hermes Portal version is available:
blog_missing.title: %s not available yet
blog_missing.body: %s is generated by the Hermes Agent — either via cronjob (news, briefing) or when saving a task in the app. As soon as the agent produces the file, it appears here.
blog_missing.causes.title: Common causes
blog_missing.causes.no_agent: Hermes Agent isn't running on the configured host. Check connection settings in Settings → 🛰️ App.
blog_missing.causes.local: Connection mode is „local" but no Hermes on the same host. In the HA add-on, useful when your agent is on a separate VM — switch to „ssh" in settings.
blog_missing.causes.cron: Cronjob hasn't run yet. You can trigger the briefing manually under ☕ Briefing → „Generate now".
blog_missing.hide.title: Hide this page
blog_missing.hide.body: If you don't want to use %s, you can disable the menu item under Settings → 🛰️ App → „📑 Menu items visible". Header and sidebar will hide it.
